data.title: China Confirms Xi-Trump Summit That Was Delayed by Iran War
data.description: Beijing officially announced the date of Donald Trump’s state visit this week, publicly green-lighting the first US presidential trip to China in nearly a decade despite tensions over the Iran war.
data.keywords: China,Donald John Trump,Iran,War,Beijing,Xi Jinping,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Government,White House,United States,markets
